files.name: github-claude-attribution
files.description: Append the robot footer to substantive GitHub bodies (issues, PRs, narrative comments). Same footer the gh pr create harness injects.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: github-content-via-file
files.description: Use --body-file / -F for non-trivial gh or git content; never heredoc/inline (shell quoting on backticks/multiline is the failure mode).
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: github-metanorma-project
files.description: Issues created in any metanorma/* repo must be added to the org-level Metanorma project
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: github-narrative-location
files.description: Narrative goes in ticket comments for gems you maintain, in PR descriptions otherwise. Mechanism universal; data in companion file.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: github-no-releases
files.description: Don't bump gem VERSION, run gem build/push, or rake release; metanorma gems ship as part of a fortnightly batched release cadence.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: github-pr-assignment
files.description: Every PR must have an assignee at creation time. Pass --assignee to gh pr create; consult user-maintained-gems.md for who.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: github-pr-title-issue-link
files.description: Embed the full issue URL in the PR title so GitHub renders the cross-reference card with the PR title visible on the issue timeline.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: memory-autoload-default
files.description: When user says "remember", save to ~/.claude/memory/ + inline operational rule into ~/.claude/instructions/ file @-included from CLAUDE.md.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: narrate-plan
files.description: Before each non-trivial tool call, state intent in one sentence; name the rejected alternative at decision points.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: paragraph-shape
files.description: Soft max 4 sentences per paragraph when reasoning is surfaced in narrow side-panel narration; not a cap for maximised docs.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: sibling-clones
files.description: Clone external repos into the parent of cwd (sibling directories), never /tmp; persistence across sessions is the goal.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: feedback_external_docs_framing
files.description: External Ruby-dev docs: scope statement, link out for inherited surface, cite POSIX/CLDR conventions, define deps + domain terms before use.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: feedback_handhold_when_frustrated
files.description: Switch to handholding mode when user shows distress (swearing, caps, repeated "again"); lead with strategic intent, then numbered steps.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: feedback_metanorma_org_project_assignment
files.description: Incident-history memory supporting github-metanorma-project. Issues in metanorma/* repos must be added to org project
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: feedback_pr_always_assigned
files.description: PR-ownership discipline: never open a PR unassigned. Owned gems → self; non-owned gems → maintainer per user-maintained-gems.md.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: feedback_pr_always_tagged_to_issue
files.description: Every PR must reference a source issue (Closes
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: ribose_conventions
files.description: Ribose-org conventions for shared content: MS Teams (not Slack), redact non-Ribose names, AsciiDoc docs default, periodic memory review.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: user-maintained-gems
files.description: Maintainer table for github-narrative-location + github-pr-assignment. Replace placeholders; Nick's metanorma row is the worked example.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: common-unix-reads-allowlist
files.description: Read-only Unix tool allowlist (grep, find, ls, cat, head, tail, wc) for ~/.claude/settings.json. No writes.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: github-cli-reads-allowlist
files.description: Read-only gh CLI allowlist (issue view, pr view/list, api, repo view) for ~/.claude/settings.json. No write operations.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: ruby-bundler-allowlist
files.description: Permission allowlist for common Ruby/Bundler commands (bundle exec, rake, rubocop, rspec) — deep-merged into ~/.claude/settings.json.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: web-research-allowlist
files.description: Web research allowlist (WebSearch + WebFetch against Anthropic and GitHub docs) for ~/.claude/settings.json. Read-only sources.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: ruby-gem
files.description: Starter CLAUDE.md for Ribose-style Ruby gem repos (Bundler + RSpec + RuboCop + batched release cadence).
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: feedback_jekyll_nav_registration
files.description: New Jekyll doc pages must be registered in the layout's navigation YAML; the sidebar is hand-maintained, not directory-walked.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: feedback_pr_chain_no_local_deps
files.description: Cross-repo Ruby PR sequences: downstream Gemfile.devel uses git+branch upstream PR ref, not bundle config local.* or path: Gemfile entries.
files.author: opoudjis
